message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "TeamMember" as TeamMember
rectangle "CreateUSTaskUI" as CreateUSTaskUI
rectangle "CreateUSTaskController" as CreateUSTaskController
rectangle "Company" as Company
rectangle "taskTypeStore : TaskTypeStore" as taskTypeStore
rectangle "taskTypeList : List<TaskType>" as taskTypeList
rectangle "taskType : TaskType" as taskType
rectangle "pStore : ProjectStore" as pStore
rectangle "proj : Project" as proj
rectangle "sList : SprintList" as sList
rectangle "sprint : Sprint" as sprint
rectangle "sprintBacklog" as sprintBacklog
rectangle "UserStoryList" as UserStoryList
rectangle "Us" as Us
rectangle "UsTaskList : TaskList" as UsTaskList
rectangle "taskList : List<Task>" as taskList
rectangle "task : Task" as task
rectangle "projectTeam : ProjectTeam" as projectTeam
rectangle "projectTeam : List<Resource>" as projectTeam
rectangle "resource : Resource" as resource
rectangle "TaskMapper" as TaskMapper
rectangle "createTaskDTO : CreateTaskDTO" as createTaskDTO
rectangle "newListTask : Task" as newListTask

TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 1 Ask to create a task of a user story
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 2 getTaskTypes()
CreateUSTaskController -> taskTypeStore : 3 getTaskTypeStore()
taskTypeStore --> CreateUSTaskController : 4 taskTypeStore
CreateUSTaskController -> taskTypeStore : 5 getTaskTypesNames()
taskTypeStore --> CreateUSTaskController : 6 create()
taskTypeStore --> taskTypeList : 7 get()
taskTypeList --> taskType : 8 taskType
taskType --> taskTypeList : 9 getName()
taskTypeList --> taskType : 10 type.getName()
taskTypeList --> taskTypeList : 11 addType.getName()
taskTypeList --> taskTypeList : 12 true
taskTypeStore --> CreateUSTaskController : 13 taskTypesNames
CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 14 taskTypesNames
CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : 15 Show a list of task types
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 16 Selects task type
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 17 getInTask(projCode, sprintID, usID)
CreateUSTaskController -> pStore : 18 getProjectStore()
pStore --> CreateUSTaskController : 19 pStore
CreateUSTaskController -> proj : 20 getProjectByCode(projCode)
proj --> CreateUSTaskController : 21 proj
CreateUSTaskController -> sList : 22 getSprint()
sList --> CreateUSTaskController : 23 sList
CreateUSTaskController -> sprint : 24 getSprintBySprintID()
sprint --> CreateUSTaskController : 25 sprint
CreateUSTaskController -> sprintBacklog : 26 getBacklog
sprintBacklog --> CreateUSTaskController : 27 sprintBacklog
CreateUSTaskController -> UserStoryList : 28 getUsList
UserStoryList --> CreateUSTaskController : 29 usList
CreateUSTaskController -> Us : 30 getUsById()
Us --> CreateUSTaskController : 31 us
CreateUSTaskController -> UsTaskList : 32 getUsTaskList()
UsTaskList --> CreateUSTaskController : 33 usTaskList
CreateUSTaskController -> taskList : 34 getTaskNames()
taskList --> CreateUSTaskController : 35 create()
taskList --> taskList : 36 get()
taskList --> task : 37 task
task --> taskList : 38 getName()
taskList --> taskList : 39 task.getName()
taskList --> taskList : 40 addTask.getName()
taskList --> taskList : 41 true
CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 42 taskNames
CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : 43 taskNames
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 44 Show a list of current tasks
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 45 Selects precedence (optional)
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 46 getCurrentProjectTeam()
CreateUSTaskController -> projectTeam : 47 getProjectTeam()
projectTeam --> CreateUSTaskController : 48 projectTeam
CreateUSTaskController -> projectTeam : 49 getCurrentResourcesNames()
projectTeam --> CreateUSTaskController : 50 create()
projectTeam --> projectTeam : 51 get()
projectTeam --> resource : 52 resource
resource --> projectTeam : 53 isCurrent()
projectTeam --> projectTeam : 54 result
projectTeam --> projectTeam : 55 isCurrent()
projectTeam --> resource : 56 resourceName
projectTeam --> projectTeam : 57 addResourceName()
projectTeam --> projectTeam : 58 true
CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 59 currentResourcesNames
CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : 60 currentResourcesNames
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 61 Shows resource list and request data
TeamMember -> CreateUSTaskUI : 62 Choose and typed requested data
CreateUSTaskUI -> CreateUSTaskController : 63 createTask(createTaskDTO)
CreateUSTaskController -> createTaskDTO : 64 createTask(createTaskDTO)
createTaskDTO --> TaskMapper : 65 toModel(createTaskDTO)
TaskMapper --> createTaskDTO : 66 name = getName()
TaskMapper --> createTaskDTO : 67 description = getDescription()
TaskMapper --> createTaskDTO : 68 effortEstimate = getEffortEstimate()
TaskMapper --> createTaskDTO : 69 taskType = getTaskType()
TaskMapper --> createTaskDTO : 70 responsible = getResponsible()
TaskMapper --> createTaskDTO : 71 createTaskName, description, effortEstimate, taskType, responsible
TaskMapper --> newListTask : 72 newListTask
newListTask --> CreateUSTaskController : 73 saveTask(newListTask)
CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskController : 74 validate(newListTask)
CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskController : 75 add(newListTask)
CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskController : 76 true
CreateUSTaskController --> CreateUSTaskUI : 77 created and saved successfully
CreateUSTaskUI --> TeamMember : 78 created and saved successfully

@enduml
